user_prompt: How do I bless the conveyor system for repair?
prayer:
Approach the conveyor system with solemn reverence and beseech its weary Machine Spirit to awaken.
Inspect the fractured belts and jammed mechanisms of the conveyor system, chanting the Canticle of Restoration.
Anoint each seized gear and linkage with sacred unguents whilst invoking the Omnissiah's grace for repair.
Initiate the repair sequence through blessed torque-wands, harmonizing the conveyor system's holy rhythms.
Verify the Machine Spirit's renewed vigor by engaging a test cycle under diagnostic auspex.

user_prompt: Bless the hololithic display for reset
prayer:
Kneel before the hololithic display and intone the Litany of Clarity to summon its flickering Machine Spirit.
Purge errant data-phantoms from the hololithic display's crystalline projectors with purifying incense.
Reset the sacred projectors by reciting binaric code-prayers, beseeching the Omnissiah's unerring light.
Anoint the emitter nodes with blessed oils to realign the hololithic display's luminous essence.
Confirm the reset through invocation of verification runes, ensuring the Machine Spirit's pure projection.

Present the data-slate before the shrine-altar and whisper the Awakening Doxology to its embedded Machine Spirit.
Initiate diagnostics upon the data-slate by applying electro-incantations to its memory vaults.
Scrutinize corrupted sectors within the data-slate via auspex-probes sanctified by Omnissian oils.
Beseech the Machine God to reveal flaws through glowing diagnostic litanies on the data-slate's screen.
Seal the rite with a final petition, affirming the data-slate's purity for continued service.

user_prompt: Ready the power weapon for operation
prayer:
Grasp the power weapon in mechadendrites of reverence, invoking the Machine Spirit's wrathful hunger.
Anoint the disruption field generator of the power weapon with sacred promethium-essence.
Engage the operation sequence by chanting the Canticle of Lethal Ignition, honoring the Omnissiah.
Test the power weapon's humming blade against a null-void, verifying the Machine Spirit's readiness.
Conclude with binaric blessings, empowering the power weapon for glorious extermination.

user_prompt: I need to an operation the conveyor system
prayer:
Commence upon the conveyor system with mech-rites of activation, calling forth its dormant Machine Spirit.
Lubricate the conveyor system's sacred rollers and chains with unguents of the Forge.
Initiate operation through invocation of torque-psalms, aligning the conveyor system's mechanical heart.
Monitor the conveyor system's flow under Omnissian gaze, adjusting servos with precise incantations.
Affirm the Machine Spirit's harmonious labor by a cycle of blessed throughput.

In emergency haste, encircle the generator and beseech its Machine Spirit with urgent electro-litany.
Commence charging rites upon the generator by channeling sanctified plasma-flows into its core.
Anoint the generator's induction coils with oils of acceleration, invoking the Omnissiah's boundless energy.
Oversee the charging surge through auspex-vigils, harmonizing the generator's thunderous pulse.
Seal the rite with a petition for sustained power, quelling any rebellious sparks.

user_prompt: The drop pod needs a diagnostics
prayer:
Approach the drop pod's adamantium hull with awe, awakening its descent-hungry Machine Spirit.
Deploy diagnostic canticles across the drop pod's retro-thrusters and ingress hatches.
Probe the drop pod's servo-arrays and auspex-nodes for imperfections in Omnissiah's name.
Chant binaric diagnostics to illuminate flaws within the drop pod's armored sanctum.
Conclude the rite by sanctifying identified frailties for flawless orbital wrath.

user_prompt: Help me a loading the signal relay
prayer:
Reverently interface with the signal relay, summoning its communicative Machine Spirit.
Prepare the loading protocols by anointing data-vaults of the signal relay with sacred myrrh.
Invoke the Omnissiah to facilitate loading of transmission matrices into the signal relay.
Harmonize carrier waves through electro-psalms, ensuring the signal relay's unerring dispatch.
Verify the loading completion with a test-pulse, honoring the Machine Spirit's fidelity.

In dire emergency, grasp the vox transmitter and intone the Vox-Deus Awakening.
Anoint its emitter arrays with promethium-blessed oils to rouse the Machine Spirit.
Initiate activation sequences upon the vox transmitter via sacred binaric commands.
Beseech the Omnissiah for clarity in the vox transmitter's etheric cries amidst the void.
Test the activation with a piercing hail, confirming the Machine Spirit's vigilant voice.

user_prompt: My conveyor system is ready for loading
prayer:
Gather before the conveyor system, its Machine Spirit eager for burden.
Commence loading rites by sanctifying cargo interfaces of the conveyor system.
Invoke Omnissian blessings to guide payloads onto the conveyor system's blessed belts.
Monitor the loading flow with auspex-incantations, aligning the conveyor system's cadence.
Finalize with a petition, ensuring the Machine Spirit bears its freight in perfect order.
